title: Gifting narrative to LEND individually
description: If you have been affected by dementia, you can gift your story to LEND, where we will use it to help others. Please email us to ask for more information: LEND@nottingham.ac.uk

title: Gifting collections of narratives to LEND
description: If you have worked with others to collect narratives about dementia, you might be able to gift narratives from your collection to LEND. Please email us to ask for more information: LEND@nottingham.ac.uk

title: LEND Technology Survey
description: Exploring the changing use of technology, social media and online narratives (stories) for people living with dementia and carers.
